title: Suki Gifts International Pink Baby Bundles Bear (80079)
features: Suki Gifts International, Pink Baby Bundles Bear
Happy little soft boa bear with embroidered eyes, nose and mouth - available in 6 colours
description: Product Description Charming and simple supersoft plush small Babys Teddy Bear from Suki Gifts Baby collection. Quality pink supersoft plush cuddly bear toy with embroidered nose, eyes and big happy smile. Ideal as a babys soother/comforter or first toy. Approximately 5.9 inches (15cm) in length. Suitable for Newborns upwards. Hand wash and air dry. Please remove all tags before giving this to a child. Suki Gifts are an innovative British company, providing high quality gifts and soft toys including Baby, Teddy Bears, Plush toys, Mugs, Piggy Banks and much more. Safety Warning Please remove all tags before giving to a child Box Contains 1 x Suki Baby - 'Simply Baby' small Pink babys bear See more
